top3.sql:
SELECT r.year, r.name
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.name
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher' AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.year, r.name
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
  AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
  AND res.fastestLapTime = (
    SELECT MIN(res2.fastestLapTime)
    FROM results res2
    JOIN drivers d2 ON res2.driverId = d2.driverId
    WHERE d2.forename = 'Michael' AND d2.surname = 'Schumacher'
      AND res2.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
  );

SELECT r.name, r.year
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher' AND res.fastestLapTime IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(res.fastestLapTime AS REAL)
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT r.year, r.name
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE d.forename = 'Michael' AND d.surname = 'Schumacher'
ORDER BY res.fastestLapTime ASC
LIMIT 1;
